onboarding.question:
1. Define what "ambient awareness only" means for the logged-out indicator — should it be static text-only, non-interactive, and appear in a fixed location without any modal, popover, or tooltip affordances?
2. Specify the exact retry behavior on authentication failure — should users see a single retry button, have automatic retry on timeout, or see retry disabled after a second failure attempt?
onboarding.recommendations:
Done. Spec updated.

**Logged-out indicator:** Static text-only ("Not signed in"), fixed top-right, no interactive affordances.  
**Auth failure retry:** Single retry button inline; second failure keeps button enabled and adds diagnostic guidance.

The design spec now has four remaining design-level open questions — copy and layout for the Auth Sheet, in-conversation nudge, session expiry warning, and navigate-away modal. Those are design implementation decisions the UX designer can resolve within the product constraints now that these architectural decisions are locked.

The spec is ready for the design phase. URL: https://github.com/sanjaysahgal/agentic-health360/blob/spec/onboarding-product/specs/features/onboarding/onboarding.product.md
